## FormSpecOptions.validate property

Whether to validate the form structure. - `true` or `"warn"`<!-- -->: Validate and log warnings/errors to console - `"throw"`<!-- -->: Validate and throw an error if validation fails - `false`<!-- -->: Skip validation (default in production for performance)

**Signature:**

```typescript
validate?: boolean | "warn" | "throw";
```
